suitable_when: General farming; works for most locations with moderate inputs and basic irrigation
not_suitable_when: Extremely water-scarce areas without irrigation; very high-value market not accessible

suitable_when: High labour availability + nearby mandi/market access; can manage frequent harvest and pests
not_suitable_when: Low labour; no market access; high pest pressure without IPM; very low risk tolerance

suitable_when: Low water availability; drought-tolerant crops; low CAPEX approach
not_suitable_when: Areas with unreliable rainfall AND no drought-tolerant crop options; farmer expects stable income

suitable_when: Water is limited but farmer can invest in drip; suitable for high-value crops with efficient irrigation
not_suitable_when: No ability to install/maintain drip; extremely low budget

suitable_when: Moderate budget; need pest protection + partial microclimate; works for nursery/veg/flowers
not_suitable_when: Very low budget; no irrigation; areas with strong storms without structural safety

suitable_when: High budget + skill + market proximity; premium crops; year-round production possible
not_suitable_when: Low budget; no reliable irrigation/power; weak market access; low management capacity

suitable_when: Very high value leafy/berries; strong technical team; consistent buyers and cold-chain
not_suitable_when: Low technical capacity; unstable electricity; weak buyer network; very low risk tolerance

suitable_when: Long horizon; patient capital; drip/irrigation available; stable long-term plan
not_suitable_when: Short horizon (<2 years) without intercrop plan; very low budget; severe water scarcity

suitable_when: Wants orchard long-term but needs early income; supports diversification
not_suitable_when: Very short horizon (<12 months) expecting full returns; no intercrop market access

suitable_when: Long horizon; low water; erosion control; gradual returns + resilience
not_suitable_when: Short horizon; expecting quick ROI; very small land where rotation is needed

suitable_when: Diversified income; manure recycling; family labour availability; risk spreading
not_suitable_when: Very small land (<1 acre) with low labour; no livestock management ability

suitable_when: Has labour + fodder land; local milk market; wants regular cashflow
not_suitable_when: No fodder area; no milk collection access; labour shortage

suitable_when: Small land; wants quick cashflow; local demand; manageable scale
not_suitable_when: No basic biosecurity; cannot manage feed costs; strict space constraints

suitable_when: Has water body/pond feasibility; strong local fish market; can manage pond inputs
not_suitable_when: Water scarcity; unsuitable soil/pond feasibility; no market linkage

suitable_when: Near farmer clusters; demand for seedlings/saplings; partial shade net support
not_suitable_when: No local demand; poor plant health management; no protected shade setup

suitable_when: Limited land; shaded/indoor space; good local buyers; can manage hygiene
not_suitable_when: No controlled space; no market; weak hygiene control leading to contamination

suitable_when: Add-on income; works well with orchards/oilseeds; low land requirement
not_suitable_when: No forage/floral resources nearby; pesticide-heavy environment without mitigation
